subject: A humanoid creature bound and suspended inside a glowing sphere of magical chains and runes, in a dim blue-purple stronghold interior
description: Glowing rings and chains of magical energy encase a humanoid figure, suspending them in midair. The light is bluish-purple, with bright runic detail along the binding sphere. Behind, dim castle towers loom in mist. The spell binds rather than kills — a magical imprisonment, not a strike.
foreground: Glowing magical chains and runes forming a sphere around a suspended humanoid figure
background: Dim castle towers in misty blue-purple haze
